name: BIO International Convention 2026
description: The world's largest biotech industry convention. Companies from 70+ countries gather for partnering, networking and scientific programming.

name: AI // Bio Night — Cambridge MA
description: An evening bringing together researchers and early-stage companies at the intersection of AI and Bio. Speakers from Basecamp Research, IMU Biosciences, Boltz, MIT and Cellino. Doors 6pm · Talks 6:30–7:30pm · Pizza & networking until 9pm. Organised by Georg Wachter & Charlotte O'Brien Gore.

name: SLAS Europe 2026
description: European conference on laboratory automation, drug discovery and life sciences technology, organised by SLAS.

name: ISMB/ECCB 2026
description: International Society for Computational Biology flagship conference — the premier meeting in bioinformatics and computational biology.

name: Biotech Week Boston 2026
description: Annual celebration of the Boston biotech ecosystem with programming, tours and networking across the cluster.

name: HLTH 2026
description: Leading health innovation conference connecting companies, investors and payers transforming healthcare with AI and technology.

name: Bio Europe 2026
description: Europe's leading biotech and pharma partnering conference. Key platform for deal-making and investment in the European life sciences ecosystem.

name: ASHG Annual Meeting 2026
description: American Society of Human Genetics annual meeting — a key forum for AI-driven genetics and genomics research.

name: BioData World Congress 2026
description: Annual congress focused on biodata, AI and precision medicine — bringing together data scientists, clinicians and industry leaders.

name: NeurIPS 2026 — ML for Biology Workshop
description: Annual machine learning for biology workshop co-located with NeurIPS — a key venue for AI × biology research presentations.
